## ❓ Question

A clear and concise description of your question.

## 📋 Context

Provide context about what you're trying to achieve:

- **Use case**: [e.g., indexing a monorepo, connecting to Claude Code]
- **Environment**: [e.g., Windows, Linux, macOS]
- **AIKD version**: [e.g., 2.0.0]

## 🔍 What I've Tried

Describe what you've already tried:

1. Read the [documentation](https://github.com/gelutjari/aikd/tree/main/docs)
2. Searched [existing issues](https://github.com/gelutjari/aikd/issues)
3. Tried command: `aikd ...`

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots here.

## 📚 Relevant Documentation

If you've found relevant documentation, link it here:
- [ ] [Quick Start Guide](https://github.com/gelutjari/aikd/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md)
- [ ] [Configuration](https://github.com/gelutjari/aikd/blob/main/docs/CONFIGURATION.md)
